theme: Smallest NFA separating two string samples
title: State Golf: Smallest NFA Separating Two String Samples
strategies: trivial: emit the prefix-trie acceptor of P (one state per distinct prefix); matches the checker baseline
greedy: build the minimal DFA of the exact positive set P (minimize the trie via Moore) and emit it as an NFA -- deterministic, cannot exploit nondeterminism, stays large

strong: reframe minimality as a COVER. Each 'k-th-symbol-from-the-end == c' predicate is a candidate NFA branch; a predicate is USABLE iff it fires on no reject string; greedily set-cover the accept strings with usable predicates sharing one start and one accept chain, giving ~1+maxOffset states
headroom: sample-specific structure may admit an even smaller separating NFA than the positional cover
